mapper.insert: insert into admin_operation_log ( admin_id, username, operation_module, operation_type, operation_desc, request_method, request_path, request_ip, user_agent, operation_status, error_message, operation_time ) values ( #{adminId}, #{username}, #{operationModule}, #{operationType}, #{operationDesc}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestPath}, #{requestIp}, #{userAgent}, #{operationStatus}, #{errorMessage}, now() )
